name: claude-code-notification-hook
description: macOS desktop notifications for Claude Code events, with optional context-aware turn summaries.

cmd_prefix.title: Command prefix
cmd_prefix.description: Prefix for the alerter/open calls. Empty runs them directly. Set to 'mac' under OrbStack.

context_aware.title: Context-aware summaries
context_aware.description: On 'Claude finished', summarize the turn with a model call instead of a static message.

summarize_timeout.title: Summary timeout (seconds)
summarize_timeout.description: Max seconds for the summary call; 0 disables it.

icon.title: Notification icon
icon.description: Optional icon file. Empty uses alerter's default app icon.

action_app.title: Click action app
action_app.description: App opened when you click the notification (e.g. 'Visual Studio Code'). Empty does nothing.

alerter_timeout.title: Auto-dismiss (seconds)
alerter_timeout.description: Seconds before the notification auto-dismisses. Empty waits until you dismiss it.
